case_title: RENALDO LACHAUX VS. ALL STATES ELECTRIC SERVICES CORP.,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LACHAUX, RENALDO AS TO DEFENDANT ALL STATES ELECTRIC SERVICES CORP., , A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
